hypothesis: Cross-sectional USD-factor residual dislocation and continuation/reversion around Asia, London and US session transitions can provide causal multi-regime payoff density that is materially distinct from the exhausted index-energy-metals OHLCV families.
strongest_argument_against: Minute OHLCV may not contain enough incremental information after costs, and continuous futures rolls can create synthetic cross-sectional moves unless explicit definitions and roll-safe guards are enforced.
smallest_decisive_experiment: A bounded causal grammar on four Topstep-permitted currency futures, with discovery-only selection, frozen validation/final-development/confirmation roles, next-open fills, exact stop-risk sizing and matched pooled nulls.
next_materially_distinct_alternative: Direction-neutral post-scheduled-release bracket using targeted TBBO only after a no-purchase causal event preflight.

causal_contract.features: completed bars at or before decision_time only
causal_contract.entry: next tradable one-minute bar open after completed signal bar
causal_contract.exit: first causal stop, target, time-stop or mandatory session flatten event
causal_contract.continuous_roll_guard: no position across symbol mapping discontinuity; suppress transition bar

promotion_gates.tier_q: positive stressed economics, acceptable exact MLL and consistency, useful target velocity, behavioral uniqueness, complete evidence bundle
promotion_gates.tier_g: multiple complete normal and stressed passes across more than one temporal context, no single-day/trade domination, frozen final-development
promotion_gates.tier_c: confirmation block evaluated once after freeze and passed without retuning

branch_rules.green: freeze qualifying candidates and proceed through exact account replay; no XFA until clean Combine graduates exist
branch_rules.weak: preserve informative mechanisms and run one materially distinct bounded repair
branch_rules.falsified: tombstone exact FX residual grammar and start the preregistered release-bracket alternative
